blended.narrative: Winter Park is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,783 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 32".
